title: Small Moments at the Party
caption: The victory party at the Willowmere Community Garden glows with warmth and string lights. In quiet corners away from the main celebration, small conversations take root. Mr. Chen stands beside young Dev at a raised garden bed, sharing the kind of patient wisdom that only comes with decades of tending living things. Father Bernard and Harriet Bloom fall into their familiar, cheerful argument about local history, each absolutely convinced the other is wrong. Detective Park cannot quite switch off his professional instincts, scanning the garden for security vulnerabilities while a black cat named Luna weaves between his ankles. And Chloe, sitting quietly on a low stone wall with her notebook, watches it all unfold and thinks, perhaps for the first time, that she might have found a place where she truly belongs.
location: Willowmere Community Garden during the evening victory party
story_notes: Quiet character moments at the garden party: Mr. Chen mentors Dev, Bernard and Harriet debate history, Detective Park assesses security, and Chloe realizes she belongs.
